data.title: NWPX Infrastructure promotes four key individuals in Operations. Leading manufacturer of water-related infrastructure products.
data.description: NWPX Infrastructure, a prominent water-related infrastructure products manufacturer, recently announced the promotion of four key individuals in Operations. The company, listed as Nasdaq: NWPX, based in Vancouver, Washington, made this announcement on January 29, 2026. This move is part of a series of strategic leadership promotions within the company.

data.title: Myosin Therapeutics to present at Biocom California's Global Partnering & Investor Conference on Feb 24-26, 2026 in La Jolla.
data.description: A pharmaceutical company, Myosin Therapeutics, based in Jupiter, Florida, revealed on January 29, 2026, that it has been chosen to participate in Biocom California's Global Partnering & Investor Conference. The conference is scheduled for February 24-26, 2026, at The Lodge at Torrey Pines in La Jolla, California, where industry leaders and investors will gather. This selection signifies a significant opportunity for Myosin Therapeutics to showcase its latest advancements in the field. The event will attract numerous influential figures, providing a platform for Myosin Therapeutics to network and potentially secure crucial partnerships for the future.

data.title: Bright Horizons Family Solutions will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026, after market close, with a conference call at 5:00 pm ET.
data.description: Bright Horizons Family Solutions® Inc. (NYSE: BFAM) based in Newton, Mass., is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, on February 12, 2026, after the markets close. The company will then conduct a conference call with investors and analysts at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss the fourth-quarter performance, business outlook, strategy, and overall results. Stakeholders can participate in the call by dialing in at the specified time.

data.title: 21Shares introduces Europe's first Jito staked Solana ETP, providing exposure to JitoSOL with embedded staking rewards. Liquid staking ETFs are still under review in the US.
data.description: The new product provides investors with the opportunity for exchange-traded exposure to JitoSOL while also incorporating staking rewards. This offering comes at a time when liquid staking ETFs are still being evaluated in the US.

data.title: Ramani Varanasi appointed CEO of Libris Innovations, subsidiary of IBRI, as of Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Libris Innovations, the for-profit entity of the Indiana Biosciences Research Institute (IBRI), has appointed Ramani Varanasi as its new Chief Executive Officer. Varanasi will take charge of leading Libris and its operations moving forward.

data.title: Boh Bah Inc. expands US Boba manufacturing with new Missouri facility in 2026. #manufacturing #BobaVida #investment
data.description: Boh Bah Inc., the company known for the popular BobaVidaⓇ brand, has announced their expansion of USA Boba manufacturing with a new cutting-edge facility in Mount Vernon, Missouri. The expansion comes at the beginning of 2026 and signifies a significant growth for the company in the United States. The state-of-the-art facility will serve to increase the company’s manufacturing capacity and meet the rising demand for their products. This move marks a strategic investment in the company's future, showcasing their commitment to expanding operations in the U.S. The new facility in Missouri is set to create jobs and boost the local economy.

data.title: Dr. Mark Becker, Former President of Georgia State University and APLU, joins Knack's Board of Directors to enhance student success.
data.description: Mark P., previously the president of Georgia State University and APLU, has joined Knack, a renowned student-led learning platform for higher education institutions. His expertise in student success and institutional transformation will significantly benefit the company. The announcement was made in Miami on Jan. 29, 2026, through a press release from PR Newswire.

data.title: Hadrian corrects news release announcing ribbon cutting of Factory 3 in Mesa, Arizona, marking milestone in AI-powered manufacturing expansion.
data.description: Hadrian recently held the ribbon-cutting ceremony for Factory 3 (F3) in Mesa, Arizona, signifying a significant achievement in their AI-powered manufacturing expansion. The event took place on January 29, 2026, and marked a major milestone for the company. The news was originally released by Hadrian via PR Newswire.

data.title: First Reliance Bancshares reports Q4 2025 results: holding company for First Reliance Bank. Key numbers not specified.
data.description: In Florence, South Carolina on January 29, 2026, First Reliance Bancshares, Inc. (OTC:FSRL) disclosed the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025 and the full calendar year. The company serves as the holding entity for First Reliance Bank. This announcement included important details regarding their financial performance during both the last quarter of 2025 as well as for the entire year.

data.title: Nelnet (NYSE: NNI) declares $0.33 per share dividend for Class A and B common stock. Board approves Q1 cash dividend.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska on January 29, 2026, Nelnet, Inc. (NYSE: NNI) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a first quarter cash dividend for the company's Class A common stock and Class B common stock at a rate of $0.33 per share. Shareholders will receive this dividend in the upcoming payment cycle.

data.title: Spire Inc. informs redemption of 5.90% Series A Preferred Stock (CUSIP: 84857L309). Jan. 29, 2026 announcement.
data.description: St. Louis-based company Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) revealed on January 29, 2026, that it has given notice to shareholders of its 5.90% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock (NYSE: SR.PRA – CUSIP No.: 84857L309). This Series A Preferred Stock carries a fixed dividend rate of 5.90% and is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SR.PRA. The notice was issued regarding certain aspects related to the Series A Preferred Stock.

data.title: Teradyne & MultiLane form joint venture, MultiLane Test Products, to address demand in AI Data Center equipment market.
data.description: A partnership between Teradyne, Inc. and MultiLane has led to the creation of MultiLane Test Products (MLTP), aimed at meeting the escalating needs of the AI Data Center equipment market. Teradyne, a prominent provider of automated test equipment and robotics, and MultiLane, a top high-speed I/O test and measurement company, have joined forces to establish MLTP. This joint venture, announced recently in North Reading, Mass. and Beirut, will focus on advancing test solutions for vital high-speed data connections essential in the industry. The agreement, involving Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER), seeks to address the demand in this sector by leveraging the expertise and resources of both companies.
Orion plans to offer common stock to the public.
US Treasury: Recent depreciation in Korean won not in line with Korea's economic fundamentals.

data.title: Mondelēz International appoints Luca Zaramella as COO & CFO, overseeing commercial ops in 4 regions. CFO successor TBA.
data.description: Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) made an announcement on Jan. 29, 2026, appointing Luca Zaramella as the new Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer. Zaramella will take on the CFO role along with overseeing commercial operations in four geographic regions and managing corporate sales, marketing, and supply chain functions as the COO. The appointment will take effect on Feb. 1, with Zaramella continuing to report directly to Chair and CEO Dirk Van de Put. A search is underway for a new CFO, and the company plans to reveal the successor in the future.

data.title: FTAI Infrastructure Inc. (NASDAQ:FIP) to release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 26 after Nasdaq closing.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, FTAI Infrastructure Inc. (NASDAQ:FIP) disclosed its intention to reveal the financial outcomes for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 post Nasdaq closure on February 26, 2026. The Company, also known as FTAI Infrastructure, will release a press statement and earnings supplement on their website at https://www.fipinc.com/ for investors to access.

data.title: Estée Lauder to discuss Q2 results on Feb 5, 2026. Webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET. Stéphane de La Faverie and Akhil Shrivastava to host. Visit http://www.e.
data.description: Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) is set to announce its fiscal 2026 second quarter results on February 5, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. (ET). The company will conduct a live webcast of its conference call at that time, discussing the financial results, future outlook, and recent corporate updates. The call will be hosted by Stéphane de La Faverie, President and CEO, along with Akhil Shrivastava, EVP and CFO. For those interested in tuning in, the webcast can be accessed at http://www.e.

data.title: Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) declares $0.825 per share quarterly dividend, payable April 2, 2026, continuing uninterrupted streak since 1946.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in St. Louis, Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.825 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on April 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 11, 2026. This marks the company's consistent distribution of cash dividends since 1946.

data.title: Nuwellis secures $5M private placement deal with an investor for 994,537 shares at $3.09 each, includes warrants.
data.description: Nuwellis, Inc. has announced a private placement agreement with an institutional and accredited investor, selling 994,537 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants) along with warrants to purchase 1,989,074 shares at an offering price of $3.09 per share. The private placement warrants have an exercise price of $2.84 per share, are immediately exercisable, and will expire in five years. This agreement aims to raise capital for Nuwellis and advance its precision cardiorenal care in critical care settings.
